dynamics.title: Figure 03人形机器人实现工厂量产部署
dynamics.summary: Figure AI宣布其第三代人形机器人Figure 03已在宝马工厂完成首批部署，实现产线物料搬运与质量检测自动化任务。

dynamics.title: Optimus机器人在工厂内实现自主导航与操作
dynamics.summary: 特斯拉展示了Optimus机器人在超级工厂内自主导航、搬运电池组并执行精密组装任务的最新视频。

dynamics.title: 宇树科技发布G1 Pro消费级人形机器人
dynamics.summary: 宇树科技推出G1 Pro人形机器人，配备灵巧手和AI视觉系统，瞄准教育与服务市场。

dynamics.title: Atlas电驱版完成工厂测试并与丰田达成合作
dynamics.summary: 波士顿动力全新电动版Atlas机器人在丰田工厂完成测试，双方签署战略合作协议。

dynamics.title: Digit机器人在亚马逊仓库完成百万次拣选
dynamics.summary: Agility Robotics的Digit双足机器人在亚马逊物流中心累计完成超过100万次商品拣选任务。

financing.summary: Figure AI完成6.75亿美元B轮融资，估值达26亿美元。
Skild AI完成A轮融资，跻身独角兽行列。
Physical Intelligence完成7000万美元种子轮融资。
1X Technologies完成B轮融资，推进NEO家庭机器人研发。
Apptronik完成A轮融资，加速Apollo机器人商业化。

tech.title: NVIDIA发布Project GR00T人形机器人基础模型
tech.summary: NVIDIA推出Project GR00T，专为人形机器人设计的通用基础模型。
tech.significance: 首个面向人形机器人的通用基础模型

tech.title: Figure AI展示端到端视觉-语言-动作模型
tech.summary: Figure AI展示了其自研的VLA模型，可直接从摄像头输入生成关节控制指令。
tech.significance: 端到端学习突破，简化机器人控制流水线

tech.title: Google DeepMind发布RT-2大规模机器人模型
tech.summary: RT-2模型将视觉-语言模型与机器人控制结合，实现跨任务泛化能力。
tech.significance: 视觉-语言-动作统一架构

tech.title: Stanford推出Mobile ALOHA低成本遥操作平台
tech.summary: 斯坦福发布Mobile ALOHA系统，以3.2万美元成本实现双臂移动操作。
tech.significance: 大幅降低具身智能研究成本

tech.title: 波士顿动力Atlas实现全身动态平衡控制突破
tech.summary: 新版电动Atlas采用强化学习训练的全身控制器，可在不规则地形上跑步跳跃。
tech.significance: 强化学习在人形机器人全身控制中的里程碑应用

voices.name: Elon Musk
voices.title: CEO, Tesla
voices.quote: 人形机器人将是有史以来最大的产品，远超汽车业务。
voices.context: 在特斯拉股东大会上讨论Optimus机器人战略

voices.name: Jensen Huang
voices.title: CEO, NVIDIA
voices.quote: 物理AI的ChatGPT时刻即将到来。我们正在构建从芯片到模型的全栈基础设施。
voices.context: 在GTC 2026主题演讲中发布Project GR00T

voices.name: Brett Adcock
voices.title: CEO, Figure AI
voices.quote: 我们的目标是在未来十年内将数十亿台人形机器人部署到全球工厂和家庭中。
voices.context: 在Figure AI B轮融资发布会上

voices.name: Sam Altman
voices.title: CEO, OpenAI
voices.quote: 物理AI是AGI的最后一块拼图。当智能能够操控物理世界时，我们将真正看到AGI的完整形态。
voices.context: 在达沃斯世界经济论坛讨论AI未来

voices.name: Demis Hassabis
voices.title: CEO, Google DeepMind
voices.quote: 具身智能是通向AGI的关键路径之一。机器人需要在真实世界中学习才能获得真正的常识理解能力。

dynamics.title: Figure 03 Humanoid Robot Deployed in Factory Mass Production
dynamics.summary: Figure AI announced its Figure 03 humanoid robot has been deployed in BMW factories, performing material handling and quality inspection tasks.

dynamics.title: Optimus Robot Achieves Autonomous Navigation in Factory
dynamics.summary: Tesla showcased Optimus robots autonomously navigating and performing precision assembly in the Gigafactory.

dynamics.title: Unitree Releases G1 Pro Consumer Humanoid Robot
dynamics.summary: Unitree launched the G1 Pro humanoid robot with dexterous hands and AI vision system.

dynamics.title: Electric Atlas Completes Factory Testing, Partners with Toyota
dynamics.summary: Boston Dynamics' new electric Atlas completed testing at Toyota factories. Strategic partnership signed.

dynamics.title: Digit Robot Completes One Million Picks at Amazon
dynamics.summary: Agility Robotics' Digit robot completed over 1 million product picks at Amazon fulfillment centers.

financing.summary: Figure AI completed $675M Series B at $2.6B valuation.
Skild AI completed Series A, reaching unicorn status.
1X Technologies completed Series B to advance NEO robot.
Apptronik completed Series A to accelerate Apollo robot deployment.

tech.title: NVIDIA Releases Project GR00T Humanoid Robot Foundation Model
tech.summary: NVIDIA launched Project GR00T, a general foundation model designed for humanoid robots.
tech.significance: First general foundation model for humanoid robots

tech.title: Figure AI Demonstrates End-to-End Vision-Language-Action Model
tech.summary: Figure AI demonstrated its VLA model generating joint control commands directly from camera input.

tech.title: Google DeepMind Releases RT-2 Large-Scale Robot Model
tech.summary: RT-2 combines vision-language models with robot control for cross-task generalization.

tech.title: Stanford Releases Mobile ALOHA Low-Cost Teleoperation Platform
tech.summary: Stanford released Mobile ALOHA at $32K cost for dual-arm mobile manipulation.
tech.significance: Dramatically reducing embodied intelligence research costs

tech.title: Boston Dynamics Atlas Achieves Full-Body Dynamic Balance Control
tech.summary: New electric Atlas uses RL-trained whole-body controller for running and jumping on uneven terrain.
tech.significance: Milestone in RL application for humanoid control

voices.name: Elon Musk
voices.title: CEO, Tesla
voices.quote: Humanoid robots will be the biggest product ever, far exceeding the car business.
voices.context: Discussing Optimus at Tesla shareholder meeting

voices.name: Jensen Huang
voices.title: CEO, NVIDIA
voices.quote: The ChatGPT moment for Physical AI is coming. We are building full-stack infrastructure.
voices.context: Launching Project GR00T at GTC 2026 keynote

voices.name: Brett Adcock
voices.title: CEO, Figure AI
voices.quote: Our goal is to deploy billions of humanoid robots in factories and homes worldwide.
voices.context: At Figure AI Series B funding announcement

voices.name: Sam Altman
voices.title: CEO, OpenAI
voices.quote: Physical AI is the last piece of the AGI puzzle.
voices.context: Discussing AI future at Davos World Economic Forum

voices.name: Demis Hassabis
voices.title: CEO, Google DeepMind
voices.quote: Embodied intelligence is one of the key paths to AGI.
